why: Chart rolled over: lost VWAP 7115.3, LH at 7122 then LL, momentum negative both 5m(-0.10%) and 15m(-0.14%), 10:10 closed on low. GEX confirms: 7115 barney flipped to overhead resistance, 7110 barney king = negative-node fuel below spot, neg-gamma levels-break regime. Target 7107 range low then 7100 pika floor; exit on reclaim of 7115.

Short thesis broke: price reclaimed 7115 barney and VWAP (7115.64 > 7115.31), 5m momentum flipped +, overhead resistance cleared back to 7140, net gamma decaying to -16M. False breakdown in an established range; cut per exit-fast rule.

Chart double-bottom 7103.7 (10:40+10:45) off session low held, price lifting to 7105.5, 5m momentum flipped +. GEX confirms strongly: king is now a +37M pika FLOOR at 7100 directly under spot (dominant node on the board), overhead barney 7110. Long the floor bounce, target 7110 barney then VWAP 7113.6, cap into resistance; stop below 7103.66.

Bounce reached and was rejected at the 7110 barney (10:50 high 7110.1 -> close 7107.4), the opposing node I targeted. Still green; cap the 0DTE winner per rule rather than round-trip toward 7100. Momentum fading (5m +0.05%). Range keeps rejecting 7110-7115.

BREAK-FLUSH: 7100 floor that held all morning collapsed (10:50 candle 7110.1->7099.4), new session low 7099.39. GEX confirms violently: 7100 pika floor GONE, nearest floor now 7050 = ~50pt air pocket; net near-spot gamma SPIKED -18M->-62M (negative-gamma levels-break fuel); barney 7110 now overhead resistance; momentum negative both 5m and 15m. Transition out of the morning pin. Target 7085->7070->7050, stop on reclaim above 7107.

Bank the winner. Flush stalled at 7094 (6.7pt down-wick, closed back at 7096.8), 5m momentum decelerated -0.15%->-0.04%, and a +37M pika reasserted at 7100 directly overhead as a strong magnet. This tape snaps back to 7100 on every break; cap the 0DTE gain (~+2.6pt) before the round-trip rather than hold for the distant 7050.

With-trend continuation: price rejected VWAP (11:30 high 7107.4) and broke back below the 7100 pika (spot 7098.45), downtrend LH/LL intact. GEX confirms the EXTEND condition (not chop): 7100 pika floor collapsed, nearest floor now 7050 (air pocket reopened), net gamma SPIKED -32M->-56M, 7115 barney well overhead. Same setup as the 10:52 flush. Target 7085 prior low then 7070/7050; stop on reclaim of 7104.

False break / bull trap: the 7100 pika reformed and held (+32.2M), price reclaimed to 7102.5, momentum flipped positive, gamma receded -56M->-37M. The floor-collapse thesis reversed within 3 min. Cut per rule (not below 7097) before it hits the 7104 stop. Late-stage break after a VWAP bounce = lower quality than the 10:52 flush.

With-structure range fade: price rejected 7110 (repelled by the colossal -84M barney at 7115, couldnt tag it), rolling down 14:25 close 7107.8 -> 7107.2, 5m momentum turned negative. GEX: fade the enormous barney ceiling toward the +73.2M pika FLOOR at 7100 (the two dominant nodes define a 7100-7110 range). This is the right play in a pin (fade the edge), not a break chase. Target 7100-7102 pika, cap there; stop above 7111.

Fade stalled: price bounced off VWAP 7104 support back to 7106 instead of reaching the 7100 target. Structure rebalanced to a symmetric pin (7100 pika +82M vs 7110 barney -82M, net gamma neutral +2M), centering price at ~7105, so the pika wont pull it to 7100. Bank the marginal gain before it round-trips through my 7107 entry into a loss.
